name: $DOG | Ordinals - SZN I Genesis
description:
The $DOG | Ordinals SZN I Genesis Collection is the first-ever drop from Dog of Bitcoin, minted 1:1 for free with every SZN I plushie as a thank-you to early supporters. It kicks off a 10-season journey, with 9 more SZNs to follow.

Genesis holders unlock up to 50% off future $DOG plushie, Ordinals, and merch drops (SZNs 2–10). Each Genesis also acts as a burnable trump card for a guaranteed free mint in any future season. Every burn reduces supply, making remaining Genesis tokens scarcer and more valuable, the final supply is entirely community-driven. With new art and styles every SZN, Genesis gives holders lasting utility and freedom in how they represent $DOG on-chain. 🐶🔥
